mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, parent_id as parentId, level, sort, status FROM sys_department ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT id, name, code, parent_id as parentId, level, sort, status FROM sys_department WHERE parent_id = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT id, name, code, parent_id as parentId, level, sort, status FROM sys_department WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, status, department_id as departmentId, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM sys_user WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
